description: Fueling & recovery decision engine combining MacroFactor nutrition with Garmin training data
name: io.github.NasserAlbusaidi/macrofactor-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to the local DuckDB database (default: ~/.macrofactor/macrofactor.duckdb)
environmentVariables.name: MACROFACTOR_DB_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Directory watched for MacroFactor export files to auto-import (default: ~/Downloads)
environmentVariables.name: MACROFACTOR_DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Directory holding Garmin Connect auth tokens for optional Garmin sync (default: ~/.garminconnect)
environmentVariables.name: GARMINTOKENS
